CONTENT.Club career: He made his Serie C debut for Olbia on 4 September 2016 in a game against Lucchese.He made his Serie A debut for Cagliari on 25 August 2019, playing a full game against Brescia.On 9 January 2020, he joined Empoli in Serie B on loan.On 11 January 2021 he moved on loan to Ascoli.On 31 August 2021, he returned to Olbia on a permanent basis and signed a two-year contract. On 1 September 2022, Pinna's contract with Olbia was terminated by mutual consent.
CONTENT.External links: Simone Pinna at SoccerwaySimone Pinna at TuttoCalciatori.net (in Italian)

SUMMARY: Simone Pinna (born 17 October 1997) is an Italian footballer who plays as a defender for Monastir.
